sizing_rule.note: Van Tharp fixed fractional sizing: position_size = (risk_pct × account_equity) / stop_loss_distance_dollars. Risk per position capped at 3-5% of account equity with defined stop loss.

source_rule_text: A trader should size positions by calculating the number of shares/contracts that limits total position risk to a fixed percentage of account equity, determined by the stop loss distance and system expectancy.
